title: Mission
body:
Mission
Create the definitive career guide for AEM developers.

  • Evidence over assumptions
  • Long-term value
  • Publication quality
  • Continuous improvement

title: Career Strategy
summary: Long-term direction for AEM developers in India.
body: Target product companies and GCCs in India that invest in Adobe Experience Cloud. Deep AEM skills beat shallow full-stack breadth. Even when you are not switching jobs, stay interview-ready: update profiles, sit a market-check interview every 3–6 months, and close skill gaps when interviews expose them.

title: Professional Branding
summary: Positioning and reusable messaging for AEM roles.
body: Present yourself as an AEM Developer with clear skills in Sites, Cloud Service, Dispatcher, and integrations. Use the templates below for LinkedIn, Naukri, outreach emails, and resume bullets.

title: Core Skills
summary: Priority technologies for senior AEM developers.
body: Master the intersection of AEM platform engineering (Sites, Assets, Cloud Service), integration (Analytics, Target, AEP), and delivery (Dispatcher, CDN, Edge Delivery). The technology reference table lists prerequisites and official Adobe resources.

title: Learning Roadmap
body: Follow the three learning paths in this handbook: AEM foundation, Cloud & Edge, and Experience Platform integration. Each step links to technologies and curated resources.

title: Target Companies
summary: AEM employers for your target list.

title: How to Apply
summary: Step-by-step apply workflow for AEM roles — resume, LinkedIn, Naukri, outreach, and tools.
body: This guide is for staying job-ready, not only active job search. Practical steps for Indian job portals and notice periods — plus learning from every interview. Templates are in Professional Branding.

title: Career Command Center
body:
• Master Company Database ✓
  • Recruiter CRM (planned)
  • Application Tracker (planned)
  • Interview Tracker (planned)
  • Learning Tracker (roadmaps + glossary live)
  • Decision Log

title: Glossary
summary: AEM and DXP terms used throughout this playbook.
body: Short definitions of AEM, DXP, and related terms. Cross-links appear in the related-terms column.

title: Interview Prep
summary: Technical and behavioural questions for AEM roles.
body: Preparation guidance — common AEM topics and frameworks employers ask about. Not a guarantee of exact questions at any company.

title: Living Roadmap
body: Official Adobe documentation and courses referenced across this playbook. Milestone 12 will add publishing (GitHub Pages, print, PDF).
